creator: john@saltant.com
text:
merge-quarterly is OBE. subpoet's patch appears in 2021Q3 [0].

Related progress report: my patch to depend on the third-party library only for Python <3.5 was accepted upstream [1].

[0] https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/sysutils/py-scandir/files/patch-_scandir.c?h=2021Q3
[1] https://github.com/graphite-project/graphite-web/commit/357bfdd9838b75adf890577c5d76070c16cb9223
